title: Conduct erosion and sediment control activities
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct erosion and sediment control activities demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to work

pcs.text: Read and interpret work instructions and clarify with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read and interpret work instructions and clarify with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read and interpret work instructions and clarify with supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare tools and equipment and use according to instructions and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare tools and equipment and use according to instructions and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare tools and equipment and use according to instructions and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor for instructions on controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor for instructions on controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor for instructions on controls.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to work

elements.title: Conduct erosion and sediment control activities

pcs.text: Identify erosion and sediment risks at a site and confirm with supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out sediment control and maintenance activities.

pcs.text: Operate tools, machinery and equipment according to operator instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate tools, machinery and equipment according to operator instructions.

elements.title: Complete work

pcs.text: Dispose of or recycle soil and waste material from the site according to environmental procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of or recycle soil and waste material from the site according to environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Clean, store and maintain tools and equipment according to workplace and biosecurity procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, store and maintain tools and equipment according to workplace and biosecurity procedures.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
